message:
test(migration): add contract-level suites for recorder storage and migration seams

Creates frankensqlite_contract_tests.rs with 32 tests covering:
- RecorderStorage trait contracts (append idempotency, ordinal monotonicity,
  checkpoint roundtrip/regression, health, lag metrics, flush modes)
- Error class mapping (all 6 classes)
- Migration engine contracts (digest determinism, stage progression)
- Serde roundtrips (backend kind, manifest, cutover/checkpoint results)
- Edge cases (empty batch, max batch enforcement, multi-consumer, noop advance)

Closes ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.4.1.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
